title: xeranthemum nobile
intro: Xeranthemum nobile, also known as noble daisy or noble xeranthemum, is a flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, this plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Xeranthemum nobile include its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve digestive issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to address various health concerns, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
